post.description: Generate a structured knowledge summary from cleaned course chunks.

schema.title: Response Gen Summary Courses  Course Id  Generate Summary Post

post.description:
Generate multiple-choice exam questions from cleaned course chunks.

Step 1 — 向量检索随机化: 从最多 200 个 chunks 中随机采样 15 个作为本次上下文，
          确保每次生成覆盖不同知识点。
Step 2 — Temperature 调高至 0.7 + top_p=0.9，最大化题目形态多样性。
Step 3 — Prompt 加入防重复指令，要求挖掘细节、对比、应用等多种角度。
Step 4 — 支持 exclude_topics 字段，回避已存在的题目主题。

schema.title: Response Gen Quiz Courses  Course Id  Generate Quiz Post

post.description: Generate a hierarchical course outline from cleaned course chunks.

schema.title: Response Gen Outline Courses  Course Id  Generate Outline Post

post.description:
Generate flashcards from cleaned course chunks.

Step 1 — 向量检索随机化: 从最多 200 个 chunks 中随机采样 12 个，
          确保每次闪卡覆盖课程不同章节。
Step 2 — Temperature 调高至 0.75 + top_p=0.9，最大化闪卡形态多样性。
Step 3 — Prompt 要求挖掘细节、易错点、应用场景，不只出基础定义。
Step 4 — 支持 exclude_topics 字段，回避已存在的闪卡主题。

schema.title: Response Gen Flashcards Courses  Course Id  Generate Flashcards Post

post.description:
4-stage multi-model RAG Q&A with optional visual aid.

Pipeline:
  Stage 1 — Supabase pgvector / ChromaDB : retrieve top-8 chunks (bilingual)
  Stage 2 — GPT-4o-mini (judge)          : filter irrelevant chunks
  Stage 3 — Gemini 2.0 Flash             : generate grounded answer
             └→ GPT-4o fallback if Gemini key missing or call fails
  Stage 4 — Imagen 3 (optional)          : diagram for complex/abstract topics

Returns:
  {question, answer, sources, image_url, model_used}

schema.title: Response Ask Question Courses  Course Id  Generate Ask Post

post.description: Translate a batch of texts using GPT-4o-mini. Used for bilingual content display.

schema.title: Response Translate Texts Courses  Course Id  Generate Translate Post

get.description: List artifacts by status (default: pending review).

schema.title: Response List Pending Artifacts Admin Artifacts Get

patch.description: Approve a user-uploaded file — triggers background RAG indexing.

Update the semantic doc_type label of an existing artifact.

Two-step metadata sync:
  Step 1 — UPDATE artifacts.doc_type in Supabase (relational DB, synchronous)
  Step 2 — UPDATE ChromaDB chunk metadata doc_type (vector store, background non-blocking)

ChromaDB sync patches only the metadata field — no Embedding API calls, zero cost.
Reject a user-uploaded file with optional reason.

post.description: Admin uploads a file directly — immediately approved, triggers RAG indexing.
Admin adds a URL reference — immediately approved (no text to index).

Reprocess all approved artifacts in a course (clean → chunk → embed).
Synchronous — may take several minutes for large courses.

post.description:
Upsert review settings for the current user + course.

Bug 4 fix: wrapped in try/except — Supabase upsert failures (e.g. migration not
yet applied, network error) now return a proper 422 instead of an unhandled 500.
Reminder: run backend/migrations/009_review_plan.sql in Supabase dashboard first.

schema.title: Response Save Settings Review Settings Post

get.description: Return all node progress records for the current user + course.

schema.title: Response Get Progress Review Progress Get

post.description: Batch upsert node progress. Only provided fields are updated.

schema.title: Response Save Progress Review Progress Post

post.description:
Compute today's recommended review node IDs.

Algorithm:
  1. Remaining days = (exam_at - now).days, default 30
  2. daily_target = ceil(undone / remaining_days), clamped [3, 15]
  3. Priority order: review_due first, then high > medium > low, then level order
  4. If budget_minutes set and estimate_minutes available, stop when budget exhausted

schema.title: Response Get Today Plan Review Today Plan Post
